overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player drives through intersections, underpasses, and commercial districts with heavy cyberpunk aesthetics, ending at a traffic light. Continuous rainfall creates wet reflective surfaces throughout the urban environment.

events.description: vehicle turns right at intersection, navigating around orange and white construction barriers
exits open intersection into covered underpass area with reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersection in heavy rain, following traffic flow and turning right around construction zone

notable_agents.action: red sedan moving ahead through the intersection, then turning right
black truck waiting at the intersection before proceeding

entered.detail: orange and white striped concrete barriers blocking off construction zone at intersection corner
illuminated corporate signage for DATA INC on building facade
massive concrete overpass with geometric support beams spanning the road
white painted text SLOW on asphalt surface warning drivers to reduce speed

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked urban intersection at night, with the vehicle positioned behind a red sedan. Neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the background. The driver turns right around construction barriers, entering a plaza area beneath a massive concrete overpass. Wet asphalt reflects the colorful neon lights as the vehicle approaches a SLOW road marking.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza under highway overpass

events.description: pedestrians with umbrellas cross the road ahead, requiring cautious driving
vehicle makes left turn onto narrower street lined with construction walls

agents.ego_description: driving through covered plaza area, slowing for pedestrians crossing with umbrellas, then turning left

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians carrying umbrellas crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: several pedestrians carrying colorful umbrellas crossing the wet street
large white STOP text painted on the road surface at intersection
distinctive teal-colored commercial building with art deco architectural elements

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath the massive concrete overpass, the scene becomes more enclosed with artificial lighting dominating. Pedestrians with umbrellas cross the road ahead, their silhouettes highlighted against the teal building facades. The vehicle navigates past a STOP road marking and makes a left turn, exiting the covered plaza into a narrower street lined with construction barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with construction walls

events.description: emerges from narrow construction-lined street into wider commercial district with heavy neon signage

agents.ego_description: accelerating through narrow street, then cruising through neon-lit commercial district with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking along the sidewalk next to construction wall

entered.detail: tall red construction barrier wall with diagonal hazard stripes blocking off building facade
large illuminated sign for Brooklyn Barista coffee shop with retro styling
glowing blue sign for CYBERWARE store with futuristic font
large floating holographic advertisements displaying animated content above the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds through a narrow corridor flanked by red construction walls, emerging into a vibrant commercial district bathed in neon light. The Brooklyn Barista sign glows prominently ahead, while holographic billboards float above the wet streets. Rain continues to fall, creating mirror-like reflections of the pink and blue neon signs on the asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with heavy neon signage

events.description: vehicle comes to complete stop at red traffic light behind other vehicles
camera pans right to observe pedestrians on sidewalk while waiting at light

agents.ego_description: driving through covered commercial area then stopping at red traffic light, observing pedestrians on sidewalk

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing on sidewalk corner conversing near neon-lit storefront
gold sedan stopped ahead at the red traffic light with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with decorative ceiling and structural columns
traffic signal showing red light causing vehicles to stop
horizontal red neon tube lights illuminating storefront entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through a covered commercial arcade with intense neon lighting in reds and blues. The vehicle slows and stops at a red traffic light behind a gold sedan. While waiting, the camera pans right to reveal pedestrians conversing on the sidewalk beside storefronts with glowing red neon strips. The rain-slicked streets continue to reflect the vibrant cyberpunk city lights as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from a wide urban intersection into an enclosed underpass and finally into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins at a wet intersection behind a red sedan, turning right around construction barriers to enter a plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass where colorful neon lights reflect off the asphalt. As the vehicle navigates past pedestrians and a stop marking, the scene shifts from the artificial shadows of the overpass into a narrow corridor flanked by red construction walls. The camera then emerges into a brilliant commercial district dominated by the glowing Brooklyn Barista sign and floating holographic billboards, with pink and blue lights mirroring across the rain-slicked streets. Finally, the vehicle slows to a stop at a red light behind a gold sedan, where the view pans right to reveal pedestrians beside storefronts adorned with glowing red neon strips.
